movies.title: Michael
movies.description: The movie everyone's arguing about — see it and pick a side.
movies.overview: The story of Michael Jackson, one of the most influential artists the world has ever known, and his life beyond the music. His journey from the discovery of his extraordinary talent as the lead of the Jackson Five, to the visionary artist whose creative ambition fueled a relentless pursuit to become the biggest entertainer in the world, highlighting both his life off-stage and some of the most iconic performances from his early solo career.

movies.title: The Sheep Detectives
movies.description: Just dropped and already trending everywhere — Hugh Jackman shines in this witty mystery.
movies.overview: George Hardy is a shepherd who reads detective novels to his beloved sheep every night, assuming they can't possibly understand. But when a mysterious incident disrupts life on the farm, the sheep realize they must become the detectives. As they follow the clues and investigate human suspects, they prove that even sheep can be brilliant crime-solvers.

movies.title: Voicemails for Isabelle
movies.description: TikTok doesn't lie — this tender, cozy Netflix rom-com actually delivers.
movies.overview: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.

movies.title: Avatar: Fire and Ash
movies.description: Just hit Disney+ and the entire internet is going wild for Pandora.
movies.overview: In the wake of the devastating war against the RDA and the loss of their eldest son, Jake Sully and Neytiri face a new threat on Pandora: the Ash People, a violent and power-hungry Na'vi tribe led by the ruthless Varang. Jake's family must fight for their survival and the future of Pandora in a conflict that pushes them to their emotional and physical limits.

movies.title: Your Fault: London
movies.description: The absolute messiest, most addictive TikTok teen romance of the summer is here.
movies.overview: Nick and Noah are both embarking on life-changing adventures that are threatening to pull them apart—Nick in business with his father and Noah starting a fresh chapter at Oxford University. Now living separate lives, and meeting new people, they find themselves entangled in temptations, rivalries, and betrayals and their bond is tested like never before. As secrets unravel and temptation rises, they must fight to hold onto each other—or risk losing everything.

movies.title: Iron Lung
movies.description: Markiplier's viral blood-ocean submarine horror will leave you utterly breathless.
movies.overview: In a post-apocalyptic future where an event known as "The Quiet Rapture" caused all known stars and habitable planets in the universe to disappear, a convict is sent to search an ocean of blood discovered on a desolate moon, using a small submarine nicknamed the "Iron Lung".

movies.title: Project Hail Mary
movies.description: Ryan Gosling in space — the blockbuster everyone has been talking about.
movies.overview: Science teacher Ryland Grace wakes up on a spaceship light years from home with no recollection of who he is or how he got there. As his memory returns, he begins to uncover his mission: solve the riddle of the mysterious substance causing the sun to die out. He must call on his scientific knowledge and unorthodox ideas to save everything on Earth from extinction.

movies.title: I Swear
movies.description: Devastating. Critics calling this BAFTA-winning true story the year's most powerful film.
movies.overview: Diagnosed with Tourette Syndrome at 15, John Davidson navigates his way against the odds through troubled teenage years and into adulthood, finding inspiration in the kindness of others to discover his true purpose in life.

movies.title: Office Romance
movies.description: NSFW and incredibly risky — the internet is obsessed with J-Lo's messy chemistry.
movies.overview: Jackie, President and CEO of Air Cruz, runs a tight ship in her business, including a rigid anti-fraternization policy for all her employees. When a new sexy lawyer begins working for her, that policy becomes very tested.

movies.title: The Drama
movies.description: Zendaya and Robert Pattinson clash in the year's most stress-inducing A24 masterpiece.
movies.overview: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

movies.title: Hokum
movies.description: An intensely terrifying hotel nightmare from Neon and the director of Oddity.
movies.overview: When novelist Ohm Bauman retreats to a remote inn to scatter his parents' ashes, he is consumed by tales of a witch haunting the honeymoon suite. Disturbing visions and a shocking disappearance forces him to confront dark corners of his past.

movies.title: Kraken
movies.description: A massive, terrifying sea monster just dropped and it is pure horror fun.
movies.overview: A marine biologist is doing research on a fish farm when she encounters several strange occurrences. Along with the brutal deaths of two teenagers, all signs point to the deep fjord; can there be more to the depths than the eye can see?

movies.title: In the Grey
movies.description: Henry Cavill and Jake Gyllenhaal clash in Guy Ritchie's slick action heist.
movies.overview: A covert team of elite operatives are living in the shadows. When a ruthless despot steals a billion-dollar fortune, they're sent to take it back—an impossible heist that erupts into a deadly game of strategy, deception and survival.

movies.title: Mortal Kombat II
movies.description: Karl Urban joins the bloodbath in this insanely brutal, action-packed sequel.
movies.overview: The fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

movies.title: The Last Viking
movies.description: Mads Mikkelsen shines in this brilliantly pitch-black, chaotic Nordic crime comedy.
movies.overview: After serving fourteen years for robbery, Anker is released from prison and reunites with his mentally ill brother Manfred, who alone knows where the stolen money is hidden but has forgotten its location, sending them on a journey to recover the loot and confront who they are.

movies.title: Over Your Dead Body
movies.description: Samara Weaving delivers nonstop high-octane thrills in this fun action thriller.
movies.overview: A dysfunctional couple head to a remote cabin to "reconnect", but each has secret intentions to kill the other.

movies.title: Lee Cronin's The Mummy
movies.description: A terrifyingly modern, claustrophobic nightmare that completely reinvents the ancient curse.
movies.overview: The young daughter of a journalist disappears into the desert without a trace—eight years later, the broken family is shocked when she is returned to them, as what should be a joyful reunion turns into a living nightmare.

movies.title: The Stranger
movies.description: A gorgeous, slow-burn French crime masterpiece that will keep you guessing.
movies.overview: Algiers, 1938. Meursault, a quiet and unassuming employee in his early thirties, attends his mother's funeral without shedding a tear. The next day, he begins a casual affair with Marie, a work colleague. He quickly slips back into his usual routine.

movies.title: Normal
movies.description: Bob Odenkirk does what he does best in this relentless, bloody action thrillride.
movies.overview: An unassuming substitute sheriff with a troubled past responds to a bank robbery in a small, sleepy town and unknowingly uncovers something far more explosive.

movies.title: Dhurandhar: The Revenge
movies.description: A massive, stylish Bollywood epic that delivers pure, high-octane adrenaline.
movies.overview: As rival gangs, corrupt officials and a ruthless Major Iqbal close in, Hamza's mission for his country spirals into a bloody personal war where the line between patriot and monster disappears in the streets of Lyari.

movies.title: The Crash
movies.description: A devastating, gripping true-crime documentary that the internet can't stop discussing.
movies.overview: A teen slams her car into a building, killing her boyfriend and his friend. What seems like a tragic accident becomes a murder case.

movies.title: The Punisher: One Last Kill
movies.description: Jon Bernthal returns for a brutally violent, relentless final ride as the vigilante.
movies.overview: As Frank Castle searches for meaning beyond revenge, an unexpected force pulls him back into the fight.

movies.title: My Dearest Assassin
movies.description: An incredibly slick Thai action romance that has captivated global fans.
movies.overview: Hunted for her rare blood type, a caged woman vows to fight alongside the assassin she loves to protect their future when an old enemy resurfaces.

movies.title: Remarkably Bright Creatures
movies.description: A deeply moving, star-studded mystery that will absolutely tug at your heartstrings.
movies.overview: Through unlikely bonds formed during night shifts at a local aquarium, Tova, an elderly widow, learns of a life-changing discovery that may bring her joy and wonder once again.

movies.title: Ready or Not: Here I Come
movies.description: Samara Weaving returns for a hilariously bloody, high-stakes game of hide-and-seek.
movies.overview: Moments after surviving an all-out attack from the Le Domas family, Grace discovers she’s reached the next level of the nightmarish game — and this time with her estranged sister Faith at her side. Grace has one chance to survive, keep her sister alive, and claim the High Seat of the Council that controls the world. Four rival families are hunting her for the throne, and whoever wins rules it all.

movies.title: Swapped
movies.description: A magical, stunningly animated family fantasy that is pure joy from start to finish.
movies.overview: A small woodland creature and a majestic bird, two natural sworn enemies of the Valley, magically trade places and set off on an adventure of a lifetime to switch back. Their journey soon uncovers a greater threat—one that could endanger not only their species, but the entire valley they call home.

movies.title: They Will Kill You
movies.description: Zazie Beetz stars in this deliciously twisted, action-packed horror comedy.
movies.overview: A woman answers a help wanted ad to be a housekeeper in a mysterious New York City high-rise, unaware that she is entering a community that has seen a number of disappearances over the years and may be under the grip of a Satanic cult.

movies.title: Hoppers
movies.description: Jon Hamm leads Pixar's delightfully quirky, body-swapping beaver adventure.
movies.overview: Scientists have discovered how to 'hop' human consciousness into lifelike robotic animals, allowing people to communicate with animals as animals. Animal lover Mabel seizes an opportunity to use the technology, uncovering mysteries within the animal world beyond anything she could have imagined.

movies.title: Apex
movies.description: Charlize Theron is a fierce force of survival in this high-octane action thriller.
movies.overview: A grieving woman pushing her limits on a solo adventure in the Australian wild is ensnared in a twisted game with a cunning killer who thinks she's prey.

movies.title: Protector
movies.description: Milla Jovovich delivers badass, gun-toting action in this relentless survival ride.
movies.overview: Nikki's life is shattered when her daughter is kidnapped. Thrust into the criminal underworld while hunted by cops and military, she must fight to rescue her child.

movies.title: Vengeance
movies.description: A gritty, hard-hitting cartel thriller that refuses to pull its punches.
movies.overview: The brutal murder of the wife of “Toro,” a military hero in the special forces, turns him into a man with a single purpose: revenge. After a stroke of fate makes him a millionaire, Carlos transforms his fortune into an arsenal and, together with his closest soldiers, sets out to hunt down those responsible.

movies.title: Roommates
movies.description: A chaotic, laugh-out-loud roommate comedy that delivers constant, ridiculous fun.
movies.overview: When shy college freshman Devon asks cool-girl Celeste to be her roommate, a blossoming friendship quickly spirals into a war of passive aggression.

movies.description: A tense, fast-paced South African crime thriller packed with shocking betrayals.
movies.overview: When an unexpected road rage incident puts his son in critical condition, an enraged father spirals down a dark path of emotional turmoil and vengeance.

movies.title: Balls Up
movies.description: Mark Wahlberg and Paul Walter Hauser team up for a raunchy action comedy.
movies.overview: Two marketing executives go "balls out" and pitch a bold full‑coverage condom sponsorship with the World Cup. After their drunken celebration in Brazil sparks a global scandal, they must outrun furious fans, criminals, and power-hungry officials to salvage their careers and make it home alive.

movies.title: Reminders of Him
movies.description: Colleen Hoover fans are crying everywhere over this devastatingly emotional romantic drama.
movies.overview: When Diem's custodial grandparents adamantly refuse Kenna's attempts to see her daughter, Kenna discovers unexpected compassion, and then something truer and deeper, with former NFL player and local bar owner Ledger. As their secret romance develops, so do the dangers for both of them, leading Kenna toward heartbreak and, ultimately, the hope for a second chance.

movies.title: Alpha
movies.description: Julia Ducournau's bizarre, stylish sci-fi horror is a wild visual trip.
movies.overview: Alpha, a troubled 13-year-old lives with her single mom. Their world collapses the day she returns from school with a tattoo on her arm.

movies.title: Thrash
movies.description: Phoebe Dynevor fights for survival in this intense, cabin-in-the-woods horror thriller.
movies.overview: When a Category 5 hurricane decimates a coastal town, the storm surge brings devastation, chaos, and something far more frightening onto shore: hungry sharks.

movies.title: Outcome
movies.description: Keanu Reeves stars in Jonah Hill's bizarre, darkly funny Hollywood comedy.
movies.overview: Reef Hawk, Hollywood's poster child since age six, is not okay. When he learns about an extortion plot tied to a mysterious video, Reef preemptively sets out on a redemption tour to make amends, confront his demons, and avoid getting canceled.

movies.title: The Bride!
movies.description: Christian Bale and Jessie Buckley shine in this stylish gothic-punk Frankenstein reimagining.
movies.overview: A lonely Frankenstein travels to 1930s Chicago to ask groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious to create a companion for him. The two revive a murdered young woman and The Bride is born. But what ensues is beyond what either of them imagined.

movies.title: Psycho Killer
movies.description: Georgina Campbell faces a terrifying serial killer in this relentless slasher thriller.
movies.overview: Following the brutal murder of her husband, a Kansas highway patrol officer sets out on a journey to track down the perpetrator. As the hunt progresses, she comes to realize the man responsible is a sadistic serial killer, and the depth of his mental depravity and his sinister agenda is more twisted than anyone could have imagined.

movies.title: Feel My Voice
movies.description: A sweet, music-filled Italian comedy-drama about finding your true path.
movies.overview: A teenager, the only hearing member of a deaf family, finds her voice and learns to believe in herself through her passion for singing.

movies.title: Pizza Movie
movies.description: A wonderfully absurd, chaotic comedy adventure that is pure, silly fun.
movies.overview: A group of college students go downstairs to their dorm lobby to get a delivery pizza. There's only one issue: They're insanely high on a homemade drug, turning their simple journey down two sets of stairs into a mind-bendingly transformative quest.

movies.title: Crime 101
movies.description: Chris Hemsworth and Mark Ruffalo clash in a sleek, high-stakes crime heist.
movies.overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

movies.title: Humint
movies.description: A slick, intense espionage thriller from Korea that keeps you guessing.
movies.overview: A South Korean agent hunts a drug ring in Russia and goes head-to-head with a North Korean operative — pulling both into peril and tangled secrets.

movies.title: War Machine
movies.description: Alan Ritchson brings explosive, heavy-hitting action to this sci-fi thriller.
movies.overview: On one last grueling mission during Army Ranger training, a combat engineer must lead his unit in a fight against a giant otherworldly killing machine.

movies.title: "Wuthering Heights"
movies.description: Margot Robbie and Jacob Elordi sizzle in Emerald Fennell's highly stylized romance.
movies.overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

movies.title: Pillion
movies.description: Alexander Skarsgård and Harry Melling in a delightfully quirky British queer romance.
movies.overview: Colin, a timid gay man, is swept off his feet when Ray, an enigmatic and impossibly handsome biker, takes him on as his submissive in a crazy and erotic BDSM-focused relationship.

movies.title: Scream 7
movies.description: Sidney Prescott returns in this bloody, highly-debated slasher that fans are arguing about.
movies.overview: When a new Ghostface killer emerges in the quiet town where Sidney Prescott has built a new life, her darkest fears are realized as her daughter becomes the next target. Determined to protect her family, Sidney must face the horrors of her past to put an end to the bloodshed once and for all.

movies.title: Mike & Nick & Nick & Alice
movies.description: James Marsden and Vince Vaughn deliver chaotic, sci-fi comedy buddy fun.
movies.overview: Two gangsters and the woman they love try to survive the most dangerous night of their lives. As if that wasn’t enough, there’s one wild ingredient added to the mix: a time machine.

movies.title: The Mortuary Assistant
movies.description: A terrifyingly creepy horror adaptation that will keep you checking the dark corners.
movies.overview: Rebecca Owens, a recent mortuary science graduate takes a night shift job at River Fields Mortuary. Initially, the job seems straightforward — embalming bodies, completing paperwork, and keeping things tidy. But once Rebecca starts working the night shift, things take a dark turn.

movies.title: Pretty Lethal
movies.description: A stylish, neon-drenched action ride featuring great martial arts choreography.
movies.overview: A troupe of ballerinas find themselves fighting for survival as they attempt to escape from a remote inn after their bus breaks down on the way to a dance competition.

movies.title: Redux Redux
movies.description: A mind-bending, claustrophobic sci-fi thriller that will question your reality.
movies.overview: In an attempt to avenge her daughter’s death, Irene Kelly travels through parallel universes, killing her daughter’s murderer again and again. As she becomes consumed by vengeance, her humanity begins to slip away—until the cycle is disrupted when she rescues Mia, a sharp-witted teenager already marked by the killer.

movies.title: Sirāt
movies.description: A striking, atmospheric Spanish thriller that slow-burns to an incredible climax.
movies.overview: A man and his son arrive at a rave lost in the mountains of Morocco. They are looking for Marina, their daughter and sister, who disappeared months ago at another rave. Driven by fate, they decide to follow a group of ravers in search of one last party, in hopes Marina will be there.

movies.title: GOAT
movies.description: Steph Curry lends his charm to this fun, high-energy animated comedy.
movies.overview: A small goat with big dreams gets a once-in-a-lifetime shot to join the pros and play roarball, a high-intensity, co-ed, full-contact sport dominated by the fastest, fiercest animals in the world.

movies.title: How to Make a Killing
movies.description: Glen Powell is incredibly charismatic in this twisty, fast-paced comedy thriller.
movies.overview: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family, blue-collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

movies.title: Send Help
movies.description: Sam Raimi's signature horror-comedy magic on a remote tropical island.
movies.overview: Two colleagues become stranded on a deserted island, the only survivors of a plane crash. On the island, they must overcome past grievances and work together to survive, but ultimately, it's a battle of wills and wits to make it out alive.

movies.title: BTS THE COMEBACK LIVE | ARIRANG
movies.description: A historic, deeply emotional global concert event for the ARMY.
movies.overview: BTS is back. The iconic group returns to the stage for a live reunion concert to perform legendary hits and unveil brand-new tracks.

movies.title: Agent Zeta
movies.description: Mario Casas is spectacular in this sleek, fast-paced Spanish action thriller.
movies.overview: Four Spanish ex-intelligence officers are assassinated simultaneously worldwide. The CNI discovers all participated in the covert "Operation Ciénaga" decades ago in Colombia. Zeta, the CNI's best operative, must hunt and protect the sole survivor, facing his deadliest global mission yet. Top Colombian agent Alfa will join Zeta, seemingly knowing more about "Ciénaga"'s secrets than him.

movies.title: Peaky Blinders: The Immortal Man
movies.description: Tommy Shelby's final, explosive WWII chapter is finally on streaming.
movies.overview: After his estranged son gets embroiled in a Nazi plot, self-exiled gangster Tommy Shelby must return to Birmingham to save his family — and his nation.

movies.title: Do Not Enter
movies.description: A solid, spooky haunted house chiller that delivers solid jumpscares.
movies.overview: A group of young explorers investigates an old abandoned hotel, only to encounter a strange supernatural being and a competing group looking for a legendary hidden treasure.
